'''kafaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygostyle|pygostyle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygostyle|pygostyle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| kafaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || kæfæjæth || kæfæjæj || kæfæjæsh || kæfæjæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || kafafajath || kafafajaj || kafafajash || kafafaja
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || kafajath || kafajaj || kafajash || kafaja
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || kafafjafth || kafafjafj || kafafjafsh || kafafjaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kafajatha || kafajaja || kafajasha || kafajaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || kafajath || kafajaj || kafajash || kafaja
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kafajathal || kafajajal || kafajashal || kafajakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kafajaathatha || kafajaajaja || kafajaashasha || kafajaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || kafajathan || kafajajan || kafajashan || kafajakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kafajathaoro || kafajajaoro || kafajashaoro || kafajakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
